questions.text: Which Azure service or capability is BEST to assign permissions at resource scope?
questions.explanation: RBAC grants least-privilege access to Azure resources.

questions.text: Which Azure service or capability is BEST to apply policies across subscriptions?
questions.explanation: Azure Policy enforces organizational standards.

questions.explanation: RBAC grants least-privilege access to Azure resources.

questions.explanation: RBAC grants least-privilege access to Azure resources.
